caption: A man with a shaved head, dark beard, and tattoos on his right arm is recording in a studio with dark, ribbed acoustic foam walls. He wears a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. A professional silver microphone is positioned in front of him, mounted on a boom arm that features the text "Audio-Technica AT2020". In the beginning, the man is speaking while looking slightly to his left. As the sequence progresses, he continues to talk, and his right arm enters the frame, raising upward in a gesturing motion. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a close-up shot of the man from the chest up as he communicates. The lighting is consistent across the scene, highlighting the textures of the soundproofing in the background and the metallic finish of the microphone.
